# Literature Notes

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED: literature-notes v1 -->
This file is intended to be generated/refreshed from `ref.bib` so it always contains
at least a per-paper metadata stub (citekey/title/authors/year/links) plus TODO
fields for summaries.

Manual notes belong under `## Manual Notes` (that section should be preserved on refresh).
<!-- END AUTO-GENERATED -->

## Papers (auto)
If this section is empty, run:
- `python .codex/skills/empirical-paper-writer/scripts/generate_literature_notes.py --project-dir <paper_dir> --mode cited`
